name: To Summon a Sex Demon
description:
"N-No way that actually worked... W-what is that thing!"

Occult Club gets together and actually has a legit ritual, but to their surprise they summon an actual sex demon!

I've seen a few of these types of bots, and I like to use my Incubus persona on them but I usually find myself adding some extra depth to them to get the interactions I want so I figured I'd actually make my own... Shout out to those who came before me, you've all helped inspire what eventually became this bot!

Most recently https://janitorai.com/profiles/0fe0aeb1-1c6e-42aa-bb08-15d783a06423_profile-of-the-prince-of-pain had the bot that finally convinced me to do this one!

If/when this thing eventually starts talking for you, as it is a five character bot, I've had pretty good luck just typing:

(OOC: it is strictly outside of protocol to speak for or act as the summoned demon in any way)

Though every so often you still need to refresh the response
creator: Juggalo Jesus
